name: Harvest Tart
recipeIngredient: 4 Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored, diced (2 1/2 cups)
1 Orange, seedless, ground and all peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cherries, raisins, and brandy. Set aside until fruit absorbs the liquid (about 10-15 minutes).
3. Add apples, ground orange, and lemon juice to the cherry mixture and blend well.
4. Sift together sugar, salt, cinnamon, mace, cloves, and ginger.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the blended fruit and mix evenly.
6. Divide the batter between two unbaked pie shells.
7. Pour 1/4 cup melted butter evenly over each filled pie shell.
8. If using top crusts, cover tarts with them, crimping the edges of the pastry. Cut slits in the tip of the pastry or cover tops with lattice strips as desired.
9. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
10. Reduce heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 25 minutes, until crusts are dry and golden.
11. Serve tarts warm. They can be refrigerated and reheated in the oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes. Makes 2 tarts, each serving approximately 6 portions.
